title: Gluten-Free Rice Roll
description: A simple and delicious gluten-free dish made with rice and a few other ingredients.

ingredients.name: Optional: sesame seeds or chopped scallions for garnish

instructions: 1. Rinse the rice and soak it in water for at least 30 minutes.
2. Drain the water and mix the rice with gluten-free rice flour in a bowl.
3. Gradually add in water and mix until a sticky dough forms.
4. Knead the dough for about 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
5. Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on how large you want your rolls to be.
6. Roll each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
7. Heat a non-stick pan or a cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
8. Brush the pan with a little vegetable oil and place a rolled circle in the pan.
9. Cook the roll for about 2-3 minutes on each side, until it is lightly browned and crispy.
10. Repeat with the remaining dough and serve the rolls warm with your favorite fillings.
